prompt: A hyperrealistic Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max advertisement shot in a dark, moody editorial style. A young stylish woman with a warm complexion and soft upswept brunette hair, wearing a dusty mauve velvet off-shoulder mini dress, thigh-high taupe suede heeled boots, and a thin black choker necklace, is captured mid-pose extending her arm forward holding an iPhone 17 Pro Max toward the camera in a confident selfie gesture. The phone — featuring a titanium Desert Sand finish with a flush quad-lens camera system and a edge-to-edge ProMotion display glowing with vivid color — dominates the center of the frame. The composition uses shallow depth of field with tack-sharp focus on the phone screen and extended arm, soft cinematic blur on the background figure. The near-black charcoal background is layered with subtle urban texture — faint graffiti strokes in electric yellow and muted olive barely visible through a heavy dark vignette. Multiple rows of ultra-small all-caps typographic text orbit the phone at different angles reading phrases like "EVERY ANGLE. EVERY MOMENT. EVERY YOU." and "THE SHOT YOU NEVER MISS" — some running vertically, some at 30-degree angles, creating a chaotic yet intentional graphic zine energy. At the upper right, the Apple logo appears in clean brushed silver against the dark background. At the top center, a thin horizontal navigation-style text bar reads "PRO CAMERA · TITANIUM BUILD · BEYOND INTELLIGENCE" in spaced all-caps serif font. A large commanding headline is placed center-right — "CAPTURE" in massive ultra-bold white letters followed by "EVERYTHING" in lighter weight creating dramatic type hierarchy. Small yellow plus (+) symbols and diagonal arrows (↗) scattered throughout as accent details. Bottom left features a bold slogan lockup: "YOUR WORLD. YOUR FRAME." in large bold sans-serif white text with a thin subline reading "The most powerful iPhone ever made. Every selfie is a cinematic moment." The overall lighting is dramatic and directional — a single cold key light from the upper left causing the titanium frame to shimmer, the ProMotion display to glow, and the velvet dress to catch a soft warm sheen against the darkness. Photorealistic. Commercial photography quality. High contrast. 4K resolution. 3:4 vertical format optimized for social media.
